mapper.sql: id, name, description, sort_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM category WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT
FROM category WHERE name = #{name} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM category WHERE name = #{name} AND id != #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (name, description, sort_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE category SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
